mapper.select:
SELECT b.*, c.name AS classify_name, IFNULL(lk.like_count, 0) AS like_count, ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(lbl.id, ':', lbl.name) SEPARATOR ';') FROM content_blogpost_label bpl JOIN content_label lbl ON bpl.label_id = lbl.id WHERE bpl.blogpost_id = b.id LIMIT 5 ) AS label_names, ( SELECT cc.name FROM content_column cc WHERE cc.id = b.column_id ) AS column_name FROM content_blogpost b LEFT JOIN content_classify c ON b.classify_id = c.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT blogpost_id, COUNT(*) AS like_count FROM content_blogpost_like GROUP BY blogpost_id ) lk ON b.id = lk.blogpost_id
b.state = 1 AND b.read_type = 1
AND b.id = #{id}
ORDER BY b.create_time DESC
